Machine Learning Engineer

Company: TechStartup Inc.
Location: San Francisco, CA (Hybrid)
Type: Full-time

About the Role:
We're seeking a Machine Learning Engineer to join our growing AI team. You'll build and deploy production ML models serving millions of users.

Requirements:
- 3+ years of ML experience
- Strong Python skills
- Experience with PyTorch or TensorFlow
- Knowledge of MLOps and model deployment
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field

Nice to Have:
- Experience with NLP or computer vision
- Cloud platform experience (AWS, GCP)
- Kubernetes and Docker knowledge

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement ML models for recommendation systems
- Deploy models to production with monitoring
- Collaborate with data engineers on data pipelines
- Mentor junior engineers
